summary: Payment Runs + Anomaly Feed UAT. All 188 pytest pass (11 skipped). Payment Runs backend (KPI, list, trailing-slash, auth) all pass. Frontend: Payment Runs page loads with KPI strip + toolbar + create dialog (step 1 date+bank). Anomaly Feed: page accessible, Run Scan opens ScanDialog with days/asof/period fields, scan returns breakdown (Sales:11, Vendor:4, AP:0), last-scan info panel appears after scan.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Runs: 5 basic tests pass (KPI shape, list empty, trailing-slash 400, unauthenticated 401, create without pay_ids). Workflow tests (create/confirm/post/cancel) all skip due to no approved payments without withholding in DB. Frontend fully working: KPI strip shows Draft/Confirmed/Posted/Total, create dialog step 1 validates bank account required before proceeding to step 2. Anomaly Feed scan produces 15 anomalies (11 sales_deviation + 4 vendor). Full test suite: 188 passed.
